smoke.detail: File structure, JSON, PS syntax, encoding, extraction safety, preset ladder all passed. Manifest validation flagged expected MissingFunction warnings from sub-module extraction (W-4).
smoke.note: Single failure is pre-existing Validate-ManifestData.ps1 warning from W-4 sub-module extraction — functions moved to child modules are not found in parent SourceRegion. Not a code defect.

unit.detail: 1886 of 1898 tests passed on PS 5.1. 8 pre-existing failures (4 PS-edition-specific). 4 skipped.
preExistingFailures: Environment.Helpers: throws on non-zero exit codes (platform-specific temp file timing)
FooterThemeLayout: gives the footer a two-row action and status layout (PS 5.1 content match)
FilteringLogic: 4 filter item tests (PS 5.1 WPF scoping difference)
SystemTweaks: logs the disable/enable operation in the correct past tense

composition.detail: 23 of 23 tests passed on PS 5.1 Desktop edition with WPF assemblies loaded.
composition.note: Fixed Pester 5 scope handling and WPF assembly loading. All composition tests pass on PS 5.1.

responsiveTabDropdown.detail: All 24 contract tests passed: XAML layout, adaptive mode enforcement, padding thresholds, SizeChanged handler, tab selection, TabManagement helpers.

presetGeneration.detail: Minimal, Basic, Balanced presets generated and validated against golden files.

matrix.note: Requires Windows 10 VM or self-hosted runner. Not yet executed.

summary.recommendation: Windows 11 Pro desktop validation complete. Windows 10 desktop pass requires a dedicated VM or self-hosted runner.
